title: CI/CD Pipeline using Jenkins, GitHub, Maven, and Docker
description:
In this video, we will build a Complete CI/CD Pipeline using Jenkins, GitHub, Maven, and Docker for a Java Spring Boot Application step by step.

This hands-on DevOps project will help you understand how modern applications are automatically built, packaged, and deployed using automation tools.

You will learn how to integrate GitHub with Jenkins, build a Java application using Maven, create a Docker image, and deploy the application using a Docker container.

This tutorial is perfect for Beginners and DevOps Engineers who want to understand how CI/CD pipelines work in real projects.

title: CI/CD Pipeline from GitHub to AWS EKS
description:
This project demonstrates how modern DevOps teams automate application build, security scanning, artifact management, containerization, and deployment using industry-standard tools.

DevSecOps Tools Used:
- GitHub – Source Code Management
- Jenkins – CI/CD Pipeline Automation
- SonarQube – Code Quality & Security Analysis
- Nexus Repository – Artifact Storage
- Docker – Containerization
- Docker Hub – Image Repository
- Kubernetes – Container Orchestration
- AWS EKS – Managed Kubernetes Service

title: Space Odyssey
description: An interstellar adventure exploring the unknown cosmos.

title: Romantic Saga
description: A heartwarming story of love, hope, and destiny.

title: Pipeline Workflow
description:
1) Developer pushes code to GitHub
2) Jenkins pipeline triggers automatically
3) SonarQube performs code quality analysis
4) Build artifacts stored in Nexus repository
5) Docker image is built and pushed to Docker Hub
6) Application deployed to AWS EKS Kubernetes cluster
